ast.name: description
ast.source: Notes must match this value in their file/folder path. Matching notes will be included in the connections results. Separate multiple values with commas.
ast.target: Notes must match this value in their file/folder path. Matching notes will be included in the connections results. Separate multiple values with commas.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Notes must *not* match this value in their file/folder path. Matching notes will be *excluded* from the connections results. Separate multiple values with commas.
ast.target: Notes must *not* match this value in their file/folder path. Matching notes will be *excluded* from the connections results. Separate multiple values with commas.
